item.title: chickenbet sign up [Board]
item.itunes:title: chickenbet sign up [Board]
item.itunes:author: chickenbet
item.itunes:summary:
chickenbet sign up
(Board)
سایت شرط بندی چیکن بت chickenbet یکی از بهترین سایت های شرط بندی ایرانی می باشد که شما عزیزان می توانید با ثبت نام از طریق لینک های زیر در آن، از خدمات متنوع و جذاب آن بهره مند شوید.

[read more]

chickenbet sign up
(Board)

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
chickenbet sign up
(Board)
سایت شرط بندی چیکن بت chickenbet یکی از بهترین سایت های شرط بندی ایرانی می باشد که شما عزیزان می توانید با ثبت نام از طریق لینک های زیر در آن، از خدمات متنوع و جذاب آن بهره مند شوید.

[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: How to Migrate Zimbra to office 365 Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Migrate Zimbra to office 365 Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: kdetools
item.itunes:summary:
How to Migrate Zimbra to office 365 Free
(Utilities)
Are you looking for free method to migrate multiple users accounts from Zimbra to Office 365 Microsoft cloud panel with local and admin users? Yes, I found a different and helpful tools named KDETools Zimbra Converter tool is a reliable solution to Batch migrate Zimbra mailbox to Office 365 cloud directly panel of Microsoft cloud, Azure, Outlook etc. this tool capable to converts multiple IMAP accounts by follow these link: https://www.kdetools.com/zimbra/
Connect Zimbra to Office 365 directly by follow these methods

* Run KDETools Zimrba Converter tool on your PC
* Click on Add button to Open Zimbra Panel
* Enter the Zimbra server details
* Connect to "Zimbra server" successfully
* Load Zimbra database in Software Panel
* Display all the database
* Click on Office 365 button to Enter the Details
* start conversion process to upload into office 365


[read more]
item.description:
How to Migrate Zimbra to office 365 Free
(Utilities)
Are you looking for free method to migrate multiple users accounts from Zimbra to Office 365 Microsoft cloud panel with local and admin users? Yes, I found a different and helpful tools named KDETools Zimbra Converter tool is a reliable solution to Batch migrate Zimbra mailbox to Office 365 cloud directly panel of Microsoft cloud, Azure, Outlook etc. this tool capable to converts multiple IMAP accounts by follow these link: https://www.kdetools.com/zimbra/
Connect Zimbra to Office 365 directly by follow these methods

* Run KDETools Zimrba Converter tool on your PC
* Click on Add button to Open Zimbra Panel
* Enter the Zimbra server details
* Connect to "Zimbra server" successfully
* Load Zimbra database in Software Panel
* Display all the database
* Click on Office 365 button to Enter the Details
* start conversion process to upload into office 365


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
How to Migrate Zimbra to office 365 Free
(Utilities)
Are you looking for free method to migrate multiple users accounts from Zimbra to Office 365 Microsoft cloud panel with local and admin users? Yes, I found a different and helpful tools named KDETools Zimbra Converter tool is a reliable solution to Batch migrate Zimbra mailbox to Office 365 cloud directly panel of Microsoft cloud, Azure, Outlook etc. this tool capable to converts multiple IMAP accounts by follow these link: https://www.kdetools.com/zimbra/
Connect Zimbra to Office 365 directly by follow these methods

* Run KDETools Zimrba Converter tool on your PC
* Click on Add button to Open Zimbra Panel
* Enter the Zimbra server details
* Connect to "Zimbra server" successfully
* Load Zimbra database in Software Panel
* Display all the database
* Click on Office 365 button to Enter the Details
* start conversion process to upload into office 365


[read more]

item.title: Photo File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Photo File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Photo File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Company www.filerecoverysoftware.org recommends secure and proficient Photo File Recovery Software is used to revive deleted pictures, images, videos, digital photographs, snapshots and other important files from damaged digital camera. Photo restoration application supports all major brands of camera like Fujifilm, Toshiba, Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Samsung etc. Data repairing tool is reliable to recover all type of lost or erased digital pictures saved in any file format including jpeg, jpg, tiff, gif, png and many more.

[read more]
item.description:
Photo File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Company www.filerecoverysoftware.org recommends secure and proficient Photo File Recovery Software is used to revive deleted pictures, images, videos, digital photographs, snapshots and other important files from damaged digital camera. Photo restoration application supports all major brands of camera like Fujifilm, Toshiba, Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Samsung etc. Data repairing tool is reliable to recover all type of lost or erased digital pictures saved in any file format including jpeg, jpg, tiff, gif, png and many more.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Photo File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Company www.filerecoverysoftware.org recommends secure and proficient Photo File Recovery Software is used to revive deleted pictures, images, videos, digital photographs, snapshots and other important files from damaged digital camera. Photo restoration application supports all major brands of camera like Fujifilm, Toshiba, Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Samsung etc. Data repairing tool is reliable to recover all type of lost or erased digital pictures saved in any file format including jpeg, jpg, tiff, gif, png and many more.

item.title: Sim Card Rescue Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Sim Card Rescue Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Sim Card Rescue Program
(Office Apps)
GUI based Restore Deleted Contact software from www.filerecoverysoftware.org website for regaining corrupted contact numbers, hidden call information, lost text messages of inbox, outbox, and draft within short time period. Sim card rescue application is used to helps both technical and non technical users for retrieving virus infected data saved in mobile phone sim cards.

[read more]
item.description:

GUI based Restore Deleted Contact software from www.filerecoverysoftware.org website for regaining corrupted contact numbers, hidden call information, lost text messages of inbox, outbox, and draft within short time period. Sim card rescue application is used to helps both technical and non technical users for retrieving virus infected data saved in mobile phone sim cards.

[read more]

Sim Card Rescue Program
(Office Apps)
GUI based Restore Deleted Contact software from www.filerecoverysoftware.org website for regaining corrupted contact numbers, hidden call information, lost text messages of inbox, outbox, and draft within short time period. Sim card rescue application is used to helps both technical and non technical users for retrieving virus infected data saved in mobile phone sim cards.

[read more]

item.title: STRP x EKI [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x EKI [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x EKI
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=blue] STRP x Enhanced Kernel Integration v1.0 (3c7d1) Release[/color]
[color=red]### Important Information:[/color]

[color=green]**KernelSU Compatibility:**[/color]
[color=blue]Ensure your KernelSU (KSU) version is at least 10940 to avoid compatibility issues. For abnormal KernelSU versions, integrate it into your kernel as a submodule instead of copying the source code.[/color]

[color=green]**KSU Manager Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]The KernelSU Manager (ksud) version should be 10942 or higher for optimal performance.[/color]

[color=green]**Magisk Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]Verify your Magisk version; it should be 25.0 or above for a seamless experience.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Sources:**[/color]
[color=blue]Installation is supported from either the KernelSU app or Magisk app.[/color][color=green]However, installing from recovery is not supported![/color]

[color=green]**Android SDK:**[/color]
[color=blue]Your device's Android SDK should be 29 (Android 10) or newer for compatibility.[/color]

[color=green]**Supported Platforms:**[/color]
[color=blue]Platforms include arm, arm64, x86, and x64 architectures.[/color]

[color=green]**Debug SELinux Policy:**[/color]
[color=blue]If using a debug SELinux policy, be aware that additional logging may occur.[/color]

[color=green]**Designed for STRP x MODULES:**[/color]
[color=blue]The module is designed for STRP x MODULES, so ensure compatibility with your specific kernel.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Errors:**[/color]
[color=blue]In case of errors during installation, the process will continue, but it's recommended to troubleshoot for optimal functionality.[/color]

[color=#954900]**Version:** v1.0 Stable (3c7d1)[/color]

[color=#988900]**Powered By:** STRP x DEVS[/color]

[color=red]Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements! 🌟[/color]
[read more]
item.description:
STRP x EKI
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=blue] STRP x Enhanced Kernel Integration v1.0 (3c7d1) Release[/color]
[color=red]### Important Information:[/color]

[color=green]**KernelSU Compatibility:**[/color]
[color=blue]Ensure your KernelSU (KSU) version is at least 10940 to avoid compatibility issues. For abnormal KernelSU versions, integrate it into your kernel as a submodule instead of copying the source code.[/color]

[color=green]**KSU Manager Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]The KernelSU Manager (ksud) version should be 10942 or higher for optimal performance.[/color]

[color=green]**Magisk Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]Verify your Magisk version; it should be 25.0 or above for a seamless experience.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Sources:**[/color]
[color=blue]Installation is supported from either the KernelSU app or Magisk app.[/color][color=green]However, installing from recovery is not supported![/color]

[color=green]**Android SDK:**[/color]
[color=blue]Your device's Android SDK should be 29 (Android 10) or newer for compatibility.[/color]

[color=green]**Supported Platforms:**[/color]
[color=blue]Platforms include arm, arm64, x86, and x64 architectures.[/color]

[color=green]**Debug SELinux Policy:**[/color]
[color=blue]If using a debug SELinux policy, be aware that additional logging may occur.[/color]

[color=green]**Designed for STRP x MODULES:**[/color]
[color=blue]The module is designed for STRP x MODULES, so ensure compatibility with your specific kernel.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Errors:**[/color]
[color=blue]In case of errors during installation, the process will continue, but it's recommended to troubleshoot for optimal functionality.[/color]

[color=#954900]**Version:** v1.0 Stable (3c7d1)[/color]

[color=#988900]**Powered By:** STRP x DEVS[/color]

[color=red]Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements! 🌟[/color]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
STRP x EKI
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=blue] STRP x Enhanced Kernel Integration v1.0 (3c7d1) Release[/color]
[color=red]### Important Information:[/color]

[color=green]**KernelSU Compatibility:**[/color]
[color=blue]Ensure your KernelSU (KSU) version is at least 10940 to avoid compatibility issues. For abnormal KernelSU versions, integrate it into your kernel as a submodule instead of copying the source code.[/color]

[color=green]**KSU Manager Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]The KernelSU Manager (ksud) version should be 10942 or higher for optimal performance.[/color]

[color=green]**Magisk Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]Verify your Magisk version; it should be 25.0 or above for a seamless experience.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Sources:**[/color]
[color=blue]Installation is supported from either the KernelSU app or Magisk app.[/color][color=green]However, installing from recovery is not supported![/color]

[color=green]**Android SDK:**[/color]
[color=blue]Your device's Android SDK should be 29 (Android 10) or newer for compatibility.[/color]

[color=green]**Supported Platforms:**[/color]
[color=blue]Platforms include arm, arm64, x86, and x64 architectures.[/color]

[color=green]**Debug SELinux Policy:**[/color]
[color=blue]If using a debug SELinux policy, be aware that additional logging may occur.[/color]

[color=green]**Designed for STRP x MODULES:**[/color]
[color=blue]The module is designed for STRP x MODULES, so ensure compatibility with your specific kernel.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Errors:**[/color]
[color=blue]In case of errors during installation, the process will continue, but it's recommended to troubleshoot for optimal functionality.[/color]

[color=#954900]**Version:** v1.0 Stable (3c7d1)[/color]

[color=#988900]**Powered By:** STRP x DEVS[/color]

[color=red]Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements! 🌟[/color]
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
